meta.description: What is your spirit animal? 🦁 Discover your spirit animal through a wilderness survival journey. Which of 12 animal types are you? An immersive personality test!
meta.keywords: spirit animal test, personality test, wilderness survival, animal personality, personality types, viral test
meta.og_title: Your Spirit Animal 🦁 Wilderness Survival Journey
meta.og_description: Discover your spirit animal through immersive wilderness survival scenarios! 12 animal types await.
meta.twitter_title: Your Spirit Animal 🦁 Wilderness Survival Journey
meta.twitter_description: Discover your spirit animal through wilderness survival scenarios!

home.title: Wilderness Survival Journey
home.subtitle: You've wandered into the wilderness. Your survival instincts will reveal your spirit animal.
home.description: Experience 6 survival scenarios across 4 biomes to discover your spirit animal. Follow your instincts — the wilderness will reveal the answer.

biome.title: Choose the environment that calls to you
biome.subtitle: Go where your instincts lead

1.text: You spot a school of fish.

2.text: An island appears in the distance.

3.text: You stand at a cliff edge.
You see tracks in the sand.

wolf.name: Wolf
wolf.description: You are a spirit of mysterious independence. You walk your own path and form deep bonds with a select few.
wolf.characteristics: Independent and enigmatic temperament. You prefer your own path, forming deep connections with loyal companions.

bear.name: Bear
bear.description: You are dependable and trustworthy. Your steady presence brings comfort to those around you.
bear.characteristics: Reliable and protective nature. You move slowly but surely, with a natural instinct to shield others.

fox.name: Fox
fox.description: You are clever and creative. Your flexible thinking leads you to unique solutions.
fox.characteristics: Clever and creative. You break conventions and solve problems in your own unique way.

dolphin.name: Dolphin
dolphin.description: You have a warm heart and deep empathy. Your kindness brightens everything around you.
dolphin.characteristics: Kind and emotionally perceptive. You easily understand others' feelings and seek harmony and peace.

cat.name: Cat
cat.description: You are an elegant, independent soul. You live to your own rhythm, revealing deep emotions when it matters.
cat.characteristics: Independent yet emotionally nuanced. You act on your own terms, showing your true feelings at crucial moments.

owl.name: Owl
owl.description: You possess deep wisdom and insight. Your quiet observation and advice hold immense value.
owl.characteristics: Wise with a preference for deep thinking. You observe quietly but offer insightful guidance.

eagle.name: Eagle
eagle.description: You are a strategist with exceptional vision. You see the big picture and act with precision.
eagle.characteristics: Perceptive and goal-oriented. You judge situations from a high vantage point with both analytical and intuitive prowess.

lion.name: Lion
lion.description: You are a natural-born leader. Your bravery and charisma inspire others to follow.
lion.characteristics: Confident and bold leader. You pursue goals with strong will and passion.

dragon.name: Dragon
dragon.description: You possess extraordinary power and mystique. Your influence and vision can transform the world.
dragon.characteristics: Powerful, mysterious, and charismatic. You dream big and strive to accomplish the extraordinary.

rabbit.name: Rabbit
rabbit.description: You are sensitive and caring. Your empathy and thoughtfulness deepen every relationship.
rabbit.characteristics: Gentle with sensitive emotions. Quick reflexes and heightened awareness, always seeking safety.

butterfly.name: Butterfly
butterfly.description: You love beauty and creativity. Your inspiration makes everything brighter and more colorful.
butterfly.characteristics: You embrace change and pursue beauty. You crave diverse experiences and add creativity to life.

unicorn.name: Unicorn
unicorn.description: You possess a magical uniqueness. Your pure beliefs and creativity make the world more beautiful.
unicorn.characteristics: Rare and special temperament. An idealist with a strong inner core.

result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants are this animal type

share.twitter_text: My spirit animal is {animal}! What's yours?
